title: grastidium lepidochilum
intro: Grastidium lepidochilum, also known as Strobilanthes lepidochilus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, derived from its leaves and roots. Grastidium lepidochilum is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
